jsmolka-arm.note: Same hash with real BIOS and HLE (bios_skip). All tests pass.
mGBA is known-bad on jsmolka ARM test 235.
HLE BIOS (bios_skip=true). All ARM tests pass.
Cable Club with real BIOS data loaded (skip boot). All ARM tests pass. White-on-white rendering.

jsmolka-thumb.note: HLE BIOS (bios_skip=true). All tests pass. Different hash due to boot state.
mGBA is known-bad on jsmolka Thumb test 230.

jsmolka-bios.note: HLE BIOS (bios_skip=true). Fails test 001 due to HLE limitations.

jsmolka-memory.note: HLE BIOS (bios_skip=true). All tests pass. Different hash due to boot state.

jsmolka-flash128.note: Real BIOS. All tests pass. 128KB Flash (Macronix MX29L010).
HLE BIOS (bios_skip=true). All flash128 tests pass.
Cable Club HLE boot. Flash128 visually shows blank (all tests passed, white BG).

jsmolka-flash64.note: Real BIOS. All tests pass. 64KB Flash.
HLE BIOS (bios_skip=true). All flash64 tests pass.
Cable Club HLE boot. Flash64 visually shows blank (all tests passed, white BG).

jsmolka-sram.note: Real BIOS. All tests pass. SRAM save type.
Cable Club HLE boot. All SRAM tests pass. Matches mGBA secondary hash pattern.

jsmolka-save-none.note: Real BIOS. All tests pass. No save type (ROM only).
Cable Club HLE boot. All tests pass. Matches mGBA secondary.

jsmolka-ppu-hello.note: Real BIOS. 'Hello world!' text in BG mode 4.
Cable Club HLE boot. Visually identical to NBA - 9 edge pixels differ due to screenshot capture noise.

jsmolka-ppu-shades.note: Real BIOS. Blue palette gradient in BG mode 4.
Cable Club HLE boot. Blue gradient visually correct.

jsmolka-ppu-stripes.note: Real BIOS. Vertical stripe pattern in BG mode 4.
Cable Club HLE boot. Vertical stripes visually correct.
